data.name: GenericError
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: OperationCancelled
data.value: The operation was cancelled.

data.name: DeviceError.DeviceNotFound
data.value: Device not found.

data.name: DeviceError.DeviceAlreadyExists
data.value: A device with serial number {0} already exists.

data.name: DeviceError.DeviceOffline
data.value: Device {0} is currently offline.

data.name: DeviceError.InvalidThreshold
data.value: The threshold value provided is invalid.

data.name: DeviceError.TelemetryFailed
data.value: Failed to process telemetry data from device {0}.

data.name: DeviceError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Device operation was cancelled.

data.name: DeviceError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during device operation.

data.name: DeviceError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Devices.

data.name: MonitoringError.AlertNotFound
data.value: Alert not found.

data.name: MonitoringError.AlertAlreadyResolved
data.value: Alert {0} has already been resolved.

data.name: MonitoringError.InvalidSeverityLevel
data.value: The severity level provided is invalid.

data.name: MonitoringError.DeviceNotLinked
data.value: No device linked to this alert.

data.name: MonitoringError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Monitoring operation was cancelled.

data.name: MonitoringError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during monitoring operation.

data.name: MonitoringError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Monitoring.

data.name: DashboardError.AnalysisNotFound
data.value: Analysis not found.

data.name: DashboardError.NoDataAvailable
data.value: No data available for the requested period.

data.name: DashboardError.AnomalyDetectionFailed
data.value: Anomaly detection failed for device {0}.

data.name: DashboardError.InvalidDateRange
data.value: The date range provided is invalid.

data.name: DashboardError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Dashboard operation was cancelled.

data.name: DashboardError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during dashboard operation.

data.name: DashboardError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Dashboard.
